title: ‘Mona Lisa’ is painted
subtitle: Painting by Leonardo da Vinci
fact: The Mona Lisa is a half-length portrait painting by the Italian artist Leonardo da Vinci.

title: ‘The Starry Night’ is painted
subtitle: Painting by Vincent van Gogh
fact: The Starry Night, is an oil-on-canvas painting by the Dutch Post-Impressionist painter Vincent van Gogh.

title: ‘Guernica’ is painted
subtitle: Painting by Pablo Picasso
fact: Guernica is a large 1937 oil painting by Spanish artist Pablo Picasso.

title: ‘Saturn Devouring His Son’ is painted
subtitle: Painting by Francisco Goya
fact: Saturn Devouring His Son is a painting by Spanish artist Francisco Goya.

title: ‘The Garden of Earthly Delights’ is painted
subtitle: Painting by Hieronymus Bosch
fact: The Garden of Earthly Delights is the modern title given to a five-panel triptych by the Early Netherlandish master Hieronymus Bosch, between 1490 and 1510, when Bosch was between 40 and 60 years old.

title: ‘The Goldfinch’ is painted
subtitle: Painting by Carel Fabritius
fact: The Goldfinch is an oil painting by Carel Fabritius, a Dutch Golden Age artist, of a life-sized chained European goldfinch.

title: ‘The Birth of Venus’ is painted
subtitle: Painting by Sandro Botticelli
fact: The Birth of Venus is a painting by the Italian artist Sandro Botticelli, probably executed in the mid-1480s.

title: ‘The Blue Boy’ is painted

fact: The Blue Boy is a full-length oil on canvas portrait in oil by English artist Thomas Gainsborough, from c.

title: ‘Girl with a Pearl Earring’ is painted
subtitle: Painting by Johannes Vermeer
fact: Girl with a Pearl Earring is an oil painting by Dutch Golden Age painter Johannes Vermeer, dated c.
